RESUME.SUMMARY: One-paragraph professional summary tailored to the role.
RESUME.UNM1: First bullet for the candidate's most recent experience, tailored to the role.
RESUME.UNM2: Second bullet for the most recent experience.
RESUME.UNM3: Third bullet for the most recent experience.
RESUME.MO1: First bullet for the candidate's second-most-recent experience.
RESUME.MO2: Second bullet for the second-most-recent experience.
RESUME.MO3: Third bullet for the second-most-recent experience.
RESUME.PROJ1: Name of the first relevant project.
RESUME.s1: Skill or technology tag for project 1.
RESUME.s2: Skill or technology tag for project 1.
RESUME.s3: Skill or technology tag for project 1.
RESUME.P1_D: One-sentence description of project 1's purpose and outcome.
RESUME.PROJ2: Name of the second relevant project.
RESUME.s4: Skill or technology tag for project 2.
RESUME.s5: Skill or technology tag for project 2.
RESUME.s6: Skill or technology tag for project 2.
RESUME.P2_D: One-sentence description of project 2's purpose and outcome.
RESUME.C1S: Brief description of the candidate's primary (most recent) degree or coursework.
RESUME.C2S: Brief description of the candidate's secondary degree or coursework.
RESUME.Tec_List: Comma-separated list of technologies most relevant to the role.

COVER.Company_Name: Name of the company being applied to.
COVER.Location: Company location (city, state) if known, else empty.
COVER.City_State_Zip: Company city/state/zip if known, else empty.
COVER.Intro: Opening paragraph that names the role and hooks the reader.
COVER.Body1: First body paragraph: most relevant experience tied to the posting's needs.
COVER.Body2: Second body paragraph: complementary skills, projects, or motivation.
COVER.Conclusion: Closing paragraph with call to action.
